translations.Hello there! What can I help you with to: Azul dagi! Deg wacu i zemreɣ ad k-ɛiwneɣ ass-a?
translations.Try sending a message to spark a convers: Ɛreḍ ad tazneḍ izen akken ad tessenkreḍ adiwenni.
translations.Output shown here is generated by AI. Ma: Tuffɣa i d-yettwaseknen da tettusirew sɣur Tigzi Taragmawant. Selken yal tikkelt anect-a.
